Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: the normal flow is Register Order Perform Credit Check Validate Stock Confirm Shipment Ship Goods Issue Invoice Receive Payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: then compare each orders event sequence against it

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Starting with case_id 1001 the sequence is correct All steps are in order

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: case_id 1002 Register Order then Confirm Shipment then Ship Goods then Perform Credit Check and Validate Stock Thats out of order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The credit check and stock validation should come before confirming shipment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: This could be a process error or maybe a system glitch where steps were skipped or reordered

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 Register Order Perform Credit Check Ship Goods Issue Invoice Confirm Shipment Receive Payment Shipping goods before confirming shipment and validating stock Thats a problem Also shipment confirmation comes after shipping which doesnt make sense

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: This might be a data entry error or a workflow bypass

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 Register Order Receive Payment Issue Invoice Confirm Shipment Ship Goods Receiving payment first Thats definitely out of order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Normally you ship goods before invoicing and payment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: This could be a serious process violation maybe a system error where steps were misordered or someone manually entered events incorrectly

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: for each anomaly I need to think of SQL queries to find similar cases

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I can check for orders where Confirm Shipment happens before Perform Credit Check or Validate Stock

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: find orders where Ship Goods occurs before Confirm Shipment

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: find orders where Receive Payment is before Issue Invoice

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: case 1002 didnt have a Validate Stock event but its present in the data Wait in case 1002 Validate Stock is there but after Ship Goods So maybe missing events arent the issue here but the order is

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Another angle check for orders where certain events are missing For example if an order is shipped but not confirmed Or if payment is received without an invoice

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: check for orders with multiple events where the sequence is not following the expected order

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Maybe different resources cant perform certain actions out of order

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Possible SQL queries Find orders where Confirm Shipment occurs before Perform Credit Check or Validate Stock Find orders where Ship Goods occurs before Confirm Shipment Find orders where Receive Payment occurs before Issue Invoice Check for missing events in the process flow for any order Identify orders where the event sequence deviates from the expected order using window functions to check the order of activities

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: maybe check for orders where the same event is performed multiple times or by different resources but in the examples given that doesnt seem to be the case
